---
title: "STAT1200 Introduction to Design Examples"
author: "Sean Hellingman"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Example 1 from slides

Experimental units (subjects):

Factors (treatments):

Levels:

Response variable:

Design:

## Example 2 from slides

Experimental units (subjects):

Factors (treatments):

Levels:

Response variable:

Design:
